description: You are an agricultural field scout conducting Integrated Pest Management (IPM) assessments across Iowa crop production zones. In the scout_zones layer of the crop_pest_scouting.gpkg project, update the treatment_recommendation, action_notes, and recheck_date fields based on recorded pest counts and University of Iowa Extension IPM economic thresholds. Set treatment_recommendation to 'TREAT' for any zone where at least one pest count exceeds its threshold: soybean aphid >250 per plant, corn rootworm beetles >5 per trap per day, European corn borer egg masses >10 per 100 plants, bean leaf beetle >8 per sweep-net pass, or defoliation >20% pre-bloom. For 'TREAT' zones, identify the exceeding

metadata.occupation_name: Farmworkers and Laborers, Crop, Nursery, and Greenhouse
metadata.data_source: Iowa county agricultural areas (USDA NASS), UI Extension IPM thresholds
